title: SpaceX Makes a Historic Stock Market Debut

segments.title: Wall Street History
segments.audioText: Tonight, SpaceX blasting into the public market with the biggest IPO in history.
segments.transcript: Tonight, SpaceX blasting into the public market with the biggest IPO in history.
segments.translationZh: 今晚，SpaceX 衝入公開市場，成為史上最大型嘅首次公開招股。

points.label: Tonight, SpaceX
points.explanationZh: 新聞開場常用 Tonight 帶出今日焦點；SpaceX 係公司名，先當作一個 chunk 聽。

points.label: blasting into the public market
points.explanationZh: blasting 有『高速衝入』嘅感覺，配合火箭公司好有畫面；public market 指公開股票市場。

points.label: the biggest IPO in history
points.explanationZh: IPO 係 initial public offering，即公司首次公開招股；in history 即史上。

segments.title: First Trillionaire
segments.audioText: Launching its founder, Elon Musk, as the world's first trillionaire.
segments.transcript: Launching its founder, Elon Musk, as the world's first trillionaire.
segments.translationZh: 呢次上市亦令創辦人 Elon Musk 成為世界第一位萬億富豪。

points.label: Launching its founder
points.explanationZh: launching 呼應火箭同上市，呢度意思係『令某人進入某個新位置』。

points.label: as the world's first
points.explanationZh: as 後面接身份或結果；the world's first 即全球第一位。

points.label: trillionaire
points.explanationZh: trillionaire 指擁有一萬億美元級別身家嘅人，重音喺 trillion。

segments.title: Share Price
segments.audioText: SpaceX stock prices at $135 a share, surging to nearly $161 by the end of the day.
segments.transcript: SpaceX stock prices at $135 a share, surging to nearly $161 by the end of the day.
segments.translationZh: SpaceX 股票定價為每股 135 美元，到收市時急升至接近 161 美元。

points.label: stock prices at $135 a share
points.explanationZh: prices at 呢度係新聞簡短講法，意思係『定價為』；a share 即每股。

points.label: surging to nearly $161
points.explanationZh: surging 指急升；nearly $161 即接近 161 美元。

points.label: by the end of the day
points.explanationZh: 表示到一日完結時，喺股市新聞常用嚟講收市前嘅結果。

segments.title: Public Investors
segments.audioText: With SpaceX, stock could soon be appearing in the 401(k)s and investment accounts of many Americans.
segments.transcript: With SpaceX, stock could soon be appearing in the 401(k)s and investment accounts of many Americans.
segments.translationZh: 隨住 SpaceX 上市，呢隻股票可能好快會出現喺好多美國人嘅 401(k) 退休戶口同投資戶口入面。

points.label: could soon be appearing
points.explanationZh: could soon be... 表示『可能好快會』，係較保守嘅新聞說法。

points.label: 401(k)s
points.explanationZh: 401(k) 係美國常見公司退休儲蓄計劃；讀作 four-oh-one-kays。

points.label: investment accounts
points.explanationZh: investment accounts 即投資戶口；accounts 嘅 /ts/ 結尾要輕輕收音。

sentences: Tonight, SpaceX blasting into the public market with the biggest IPO in history.
Launching its founder, Elon Musk, as the world's first trillionaire.
SpaceX stock prices at $135 a share, surging to nearly $161 by the end of the day.
With SpaceX, stock could soon be appearing in the 401(k)s and investment accounts of many Americans.

vocabulary.example: The company entered the public market.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢間公司進入咗公開市場。

vocabulary.example: Investors watched the market all day.
vocabulary.translationZh: 投資者成日都留意住市場。

vocabulary.example: The IPO attracted a lot of attention.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢次上市吸引咗好多注意。

vocabulary.example: The founder spoke after the opening bell.
vocabulary.translationZh: 創辦人喺開市鐘後發言。

vocabulary.example: The stock was surging in early trading.
vocabulary.translationZh: 隻股票喺早段交易急升。

vocabulary.example: She checks her investment account once a month.
vocabulary.translationZh: 佢每個月睇一次自己嘅投資戶口。

phrases.example: The company moved into the public market.

phrases.meaningZh: 史上最大型首次公開招股
phrases.example: Analysts called it the biggest IPO in history.

phrases.phrase: by the end of the day
phrases.meaningZh: 到一日完結時；到收市時
phrases.example: The price was higher by the end of the day.
Some workers use investment accounts for long-term savings.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:00 跟讀第一句，將 blasting into the public market 一口氣連住講。
重播 00:15，先聽寫 $135 a share，再補 surging to nearly $161。
用 by the end of the day 練替換：The report should be ready by the end of the day.
用兩句英文複述：SpaceX had a historic IPO. Its stock rose by the end of the day.

notes: 今日重點係商業新聞入面嘅數字同市場用語，先抓 IPO、$135、$161、401(k)s 呢幾個關鍵位。
時間碼 00:00、00:05、00:15、01:05 可以逐句重播；每次只聽一句，跟讀到節奏穩定先去下一句。
stock prices at... 係新聞壓縮句，正常日常講法可以係 The stock was priced at $135 a share.
dailyLifePractice 會轉去較輕鬆實用嘅日常場景：問價錢、解釋延誤、同做工作更新。

dailyLifePractice.title: Checking a Price
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你喺店入面見到價錢有啲唔清楚，想自然問店員確認。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, can you check the price on this for me? I thought it was on sale. No worries, I'll take it if that's the current price.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, can you check the price on this for me?
lines.zh: 你好，可唔可以幫我查一查呢個價錢？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I thought it was on sale.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: No worries, I'll take it if that's the current price.
lines.zh: 冇問題，如果呢個係現價，我要啦。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Can you check the price on this for me? 好自然又有禮貌。No worries 可以化解小尷尬，唔會聽落好硬。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 price 換成 size、color 或 discount。
drills.example: Can you check the size on this for me?

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 I thought it was on sale 三次，留意 thought it 連讀。
drills.example: I thought it was on sale.

dailyLifePractice.title: Explaining a Delay
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你因為等排隊或付款慢咗，要同朋友講會遲少少。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: I'm still checking out. The line is moving slowly. I should be there in about ten minutes.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I should be there in about ten minutes.
lines.zh: 我應該大概十分鐘後到。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: checking out 可以解『結帳』，唔一定係酒店退房。I should be there in about... 比 I will arrive... 更口語。

drills.label: Short response
drills.prompt: 朋友問 Are you close? 用一句英文回覆。
drills.example: Yeah, I should be there in about ten minutes.

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 The line is moving slowly 換成你自己嘅延誤原因。

dailyLifePractice.title: Quick Work Update
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：工作或學校小組入面，你想簡短更新進度同講完成時間。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Quick update: I'm almost done with my part. I just need to double-check the numbers. I'll send it over by the end of the day.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Quick update: I'm almost done with my part.
lines.zh: 快快更新一下：我嗰部分差唔多完成。

lines.speaker: Coworker
lines.en: Sounds good. Anything you need from me?
lines.zh: 好呀。你有冇需要我幫手嘅？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I just need to double-check the numbers.
lines.zh: 我只係要再確認一下啲數字。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I'll send it over by the end of the day.
lines.zh: 我今日完之前會傳畀你。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Quick update: 係美式職場好常用嘅開場，簡短自然。send it over 即『傳／發畀你』，比 send it to you 更口語。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 my part 換成 the slides、the email 或 the draft。
drills.example: I'm almost done with the slides.

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 I'll send it over by... 講一個你會交嘢嘅時間。
drills.example: I'll send it over by tomorrow morning.
